name: folder-monitor-tools
description: Folder monitoring skills and scripts for detecting new local files, triaging them, and routing them to downstream document or meeting workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Detect and triage new local files for downstream workflows.
interface.longDescription: A local Codex plugin with skills and scripts for manual or scheduled folder scans, new-file triage, monitoring policy design, and routing files into document intake workflows.
defaultPrompt: Design a monitoring policy for this transcript folder.
Scan this folder for new meeting files and triage them.
Route this new file to the right document intake workflow.
